chapter_title.ar: باب وَضْعِ الْجَبْهَةِ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Placing of the forehead upon the ground

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/152)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/152)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا وَضَعْتَ جَبْهَتَكَ عَلَى نَبَكَةٍ فَلَا تَرْفَعْهَا وَ لَكِنْ جُرَّهَا عَلَى الْأَرْضِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘When you place your forehead upon a mound, so do not raise it, but drag it upon the ground (towards the place of Sajdah’).
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If you place your forehead on an uneven place, do not raise it to place on a proper place: instead drag it on the ground.’”
